---
title: "Tables in R - Data frames and tibbles"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/data-tibbles.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/data-tibbles.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/data-tibbles.pdf){download="data-tibbles.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/data-tibbles.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [Tibble package documentation](https://tibble.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: Reference for tibble functions and differences to data frames.
- [Tibbles in Advanced R](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/vectors-chap.html#tibble){target="_blank"}: Detailed explanation of how tibbles differ from data frames.
